article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures. He has released a sample pack in collaboration with Barnation.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has made a mark in the music industry through collaborations with well-known artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production work is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a distinct approach to electronic music composition.

In addition to his production credits, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums that have been utilized in various productions.
His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, indicating a strong presence within the Latin electronic music scene.
